unchanged_controls: No scored performance claim is made from this loop.
accepted_insights: High automated score and human answer quality are separate; concise report-ready structure is now a prompt candidate.
Safety formatting must separate verified public RFP facts from unavailable final procurement/private-contact fields.
Formatting cannot compensate for missing retrieval evidence; E/F/G remains a retrieval-depth and source-scope lesson.
next_scored_step: Run prompt_sweep on a small mixed set with judge enabled only when cost is acceptable; compare report_ready without changing retrieval settings.
